product.description: FairPrice Seaweed Chicken is made from boneless leg meat, marinated with spice and wrapped in seaweed. It is crispy and fragrant, a source of protein with no artificial preservatives and colouring. This tasty and tender snack is a popular airfryer treat enjoyed by all ages!

metaData.Ingredients: Chicken Leg, Water, Karaage Powder (Wheat Starch, Corn Starch, Wheat, Salt, Defatted Soy Flour, Soybean Protein Powder, E621, Powdered Glucose, Sugar, E471, E412, Chilli Powder, Colour [Chili Red, Ins160A(I)]), Seaweed, Potato Starch, Soy Sauce (Water, Defatted Soybeans, Wheat, Salt), Flavour Enhancer (E621), Salt, Humectant [Ins451(I), Ins452(I), Ins450(Iii), Ins340(Ii), Maltodextrin] and Acidity Regulator [Ins500(Ii)].
metaData.Key Information:
• Wrapped with Real Seaweed
• Juicy & Tender Leg Meat
• Well Balanced Flavours
metaData.Preparation:
Do not defrost. Once thawed, do not refreeze.

Microwave:
Place 3 - 4 pieces of the frozen seaweed chicken onto a microwaveable plate. Microwave on high (800 watt) for 3 - 4 minutes at 120℃.

Air Fry:
Place frozen seaweed chicken in a frying basket and fry at 200℃ for 8 - 10 minutes.

Conditions may vary due to different brands of cooking equipment used.
metaData.Storage Information:
Keep frozen (-18°C & below).
Once thawed, do not refreeze.

product.description: FairPrice Chicken Nuggets are made with quality chicken thigh and breast meat that is coated with tempura, which makes it chewy yet crispy and extremely fragrant. This trans fat free snack can be deep fried or heated up in the toaster oven, and enjoyed with chilli, ketchup or simply on its own!

metaData.Fp Seller Name: SIN LI-HIN FROZEN FOOD PTE LTD
metaData.Ingredients: Chicken Meat, Starch (corn and wheat), Soy Protein, Sugar, Salt, Chicken Flavouring, Flavour Enhancer (E621), Spices and Colouring (E102)
metaData.Nutritional Data:

Total Fat 8.0g
Saturated Fat 3.6g
Trans Fat 0.1g
Cholesterol 42mg
Carbohydrate 13.5g

metaData.Preparation:
• Air Fry:
1. Place nuggets in a frying basket
2. Fry for 12 to 15 minutes at 180℃, or until cooked. Deep Fry:
1. Pre-heat oil to 180°C
2. Deep fry nuggets for 3 to 5 minutes until golden brown
• Shallow Fry:
1. Add 2-3 tablespoon of oil to pan and fry nuggets over medium heat for 3 to 5 minutes until golden brown
2. Turn the nuggets halfway during frying time
• Toaster Oven:
1. No oil required
2. Place nuggets on the toaster rack and heat for approximately 15 minutes or until cooked
• Important:
1. Conditions may vary due to different cooking equipment
metaData.Supplier Name: SIN LI-HIN FROZEN FOOD PTE LTD

product.description: FairPrice Popcorn Chicken is made using premium grade muscle meat and coated with a crispy batter. As you sink your teeth into them, enjoy a crunchy exterior giving way to Juicy tender chicken inside. These tasty, bite-sized delights are a classic favourite, perfect for snacking.

metaData.Ingredients: Chicken Breast, Coating {Wheat Flour, Breadcrumb (Wheat Flour, Salt, Yeast, Palm Oil), Maize Flour, Salt, Raising Agents [Ins450(I), Ins500(Ii)], Pepper, Paprika Extract, Flavour Enhancer (E621), Sugar, Vegetable Powders (Garlic, Onion)}, Water, Palm Oil, Modified Starch (E1422), Sugar, Salt, Sodium Bicarbonate[Ins500(Ii)], Trisodium Citrate [Ins331(Iii)] and White Pepper.
metaData.Key Information:
• Juicy, Tender & Flavourful
• Made from premium grade muscle meat
metaData.Preparation:
Cooking Instructions:
Do not defrost. Once thawed, do not refreeze.

Air Fry:
Place Chicken popcorn in a frying pan basket and fry at 200°C for 6-8 minutes, or until golden brown.
Deep Fry:
Place frozen Chicken popcorn in a fryinh basket and fry at 180°C for 203 minutes, or until golden brown.
Toaster Oven:
Place Popcorn Chicken on the toaster rack and heat for 200°C for 10-12 minutes.
metaData.Storage Information:
Keep frozen (-18°C & below).
Once thawed, do not refreeze.
